mission.title: lima: docs: discourage `/tmp/lima` on shared hosts (and deprecate it?)
mission.description: docs: discourage `/tmp/lima` on shared hosts (and deprecate it?). Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify lima upgrade symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your lima installation:
```bash
limactl --version
limactl list
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review lima configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant lima configuration:
Using `/tmp/lima` is discouraged on shared hosts, as another user on the host can peek/poke the directory.

Maybe we should deprecate and remove it in v2.0 ?
A user can still enable the directory by specifying `--mount /tmp/lima:w`.

steps.title: Apply the fix for docs: discourage `/tmp/lima` on shared hosts (and deprecate…
steps.description:
The major version is now updated to highlight the introduction of the pluggable VM driver framework.

See:
- #3712
```yaml
mounts:
- location: "{{.GlobalTempDir}}/lima"
  mountPoint: /tmp/lima
  writable: true
```

steps.title: Upgrade lima to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade lima:
```bash
# Check current version
limactl --version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/lima-vm/lima
```

steps.title: Confirm docs: discourage `/tmp/lima` on shared hosts (and… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test lima to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
The major version is now updated to highlight the introduction of the pluggable VM driver framework.

See:
- #3712

prerequisites.description: A working lima installation or development environment.
